description: Create a custom Freemarker template named 'content.ftl' for the WMS GetFeatureInfo response of the 'ne_countries' layer in the 'ne' workspace. The template must produce an HTML table displaying only the 'name', 'iso_a3', 'pop_est', 'economy', and 'continent' attributes. Save the template to /opt/geoserver/data_dir/workspaces/ne/postgis_ne/ne_countries/content.ftl.
